changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Move legacy products that have wristwatch details out of interior-clock catalog scopes. ProductService now treats watch_details as wristwatch data and interior_clock_details as interior-clock data, so category links must match the stored detail table.
changeSet.sql:
WITH legacy_watch_products AS ( SELECT DISTINCT pc.product_id FROM product_category pc JOIN category c ON c.id = pc.category_id JOIN watch_details wd ON wd.product_id = pc.product_id WHERE c.code IN ('WATCH_INTERIOR', 'WATCH_WALL', 'WATCH_FLOOR') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM interior_clock_details icd WHERE icd.product_id = pc.product_id ) ), wrist_category AS ( SELECT id FROM category WHERE code = 'WATCH_WRIST' ) INSERT INTO product_category (product_id, category_id) SELECT legacy_watch_products.product_id, wrist_category.id FROM legacy_watch_products CROSS JOIN wrist_category ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
WITH legacy_watch_products AS ( SELECT DISTINCT pc.product_id FROM product_category pc JOIN category c ON c.id = pc.category_id JOIN watch_details wd ON wd.product_id = pc.product_id WHERE c.code IN ('WATCH_INTERIOR', 'WATCH_WALL', 'WATCH_FLOOR') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM interior_clock_details icd WHERE icd.product_id = pc.product_id ) ) DELETE FROM product_category pc USING category c, legacy_watch_products WHERE pc.category_id = c.id AND pc.product_id = legacy_watch_products.product_id AND c.code IN ('WATCH_INTERIOR', 'WATCH_WALL', 'WATCH_FLOOR');
